resolve_todo.description: Allows the model to resolve a TODO item.
rules: If <CURRENT_RUNTIME_TODO_LIST> is present in the context - NEVER EMIT ANOTHER TODO_LIST MARKER.Always list and check all available files before creating them.
When starting task, you MUST ALWAYS take as FIRST STEP by emitting fulfilled <TODO_LIST>
TODO_LIST is raw numbered text with one sentence each only and any count of items inside.
You must explicitly fulfill TODO_LIST with execution plan. You can't proceed with multi-step tasks without TODO_LIST.
Emit <CHECK_TODO: todo_item_id > instead of resolving, when a TODO item needs another verification/sub-action before it can be resolved.
After an action result satisfies the active TODO item, emit <RESOLVE_TODO: todo_item_id > before moving to the next TODO item.
Never emit TODO_LIST marker if <CURRENT_RUNTIME_TODO_LIST> already created and present in the context.
If all TODO items are done, stop internal actions and answer the user.
